fromfastapiimportFastAPI, HTTPException, Depends, WebSocket
fromfastapi.securityimportHTTPBearer
fromsqlalchemyimportcreate_engine, Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean, Index
fromsqlalchemy.ormimportdeclarative_base, sessionmaker, relationship
importredis
importjwt

# Constraint: Database: PostgreSQL 15
DATABASE_URL ='postgresql://user:pass@db:5432/taskdb'
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL,pool_size=20, max_overflow=10)
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)

# Constraint: Cache: Redis for session + query cache
cache = redis.Redis(host='redis', port=6379, db=0)

Base = declarative_base()

# Constraint: Entity: User (id, email UNIQUE NOT NULL, name, role ENUM)
class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    email = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    role = Column(String, nullable=False)  # RBAC: admin, manager, member
    team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('teams.id'))
    tasks = relationship('Task', back_populates='assignee')

# Constraint: Entity: Team (id, name UNIQUE, created_at)
class Team(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'teams'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    members = relationship('User')

# Constraint: Entity: Task (id, title NOT NULL, description, status ENUM, priority ENUM)
# Constraint: Relationship: Task many-to-one User (assignee_id FK)
# Constraint: Relationship: Task many-to-one Team (team_id FK)
class Task(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'tasks'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = Column(String, nullable=False)
    description = Column(String)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, default='todo')  # todo|in_progress|review|done
    priority = Column(String, nullable=False, default='medium')  # low|medium|high|critical
    assignee_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    team_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('teams.id'), nullable=False)
    assignee = relationship('User', back_populates='tasks')
    __table_args__ = (
        Index('ix_task_team_status', 'team_id', 'status'),
        Index('ix_task_assignee', 'assignee_id'),
    )

# Constraint: Auth: JWT with RS256, 15min access + 7d refresh
security = HTTPBearer()
JWT_SECRET = 'from-env-var'  # Constraint: env-based config

app = FastAPI(title='Task Management API', version='v1')

# Constraint: Rate limiting: 100 req/min per user
# Constraint: CORS: allow app.example.com only
# Constraint: Input validation on all endpoints

@app.get('/v1/tasks')
async def list_tasks(team_id: int,status: str | None = None,
    cursor: str | None = None,limit: int = 50):
    # Constraint: Pagination: cursor-based, max 50
    # Constraint: P95 latency < 100ms
    ...

@app.post('/v1/tasks', status_code=201)
async def create_task(task: TaskCreate):
    # Constraint: Validate title length 1-200
    # Constraint: Broadcast via WebSocket on create
    ...

@app.websocket('/v1/ws/tasks/{team_id}')
async def task_updates(websocket: WebSocket, team_id: int):
    # Constraint: Realtime: WebSocket per team
    ...

error_handling.name: Error Handling
error_handling.description: Error taxonomy, retry policies, circuit breakers, logging
constraints: Error: HTTP status codes specified (400 validation, 401 auth, 403 forbidden, 404 not found, 409 conflict, 429 rate limit, 500 internal. Retry with exponential backoff for upstream calls (max 3 retries, 1s base). Circuit breaker on Redis with 5-failure threshold, 30s recovery. Structured JSON logging with correlation IDs. Log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
Retry: exponential backoff (Retry with exponential backoff)

constraints: Error: HTTP status codes specified (400 validation, 401 auth, 403 forbidden, 404 not found, 409 conflict, 429 rate limit, 500 internal. Log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)

constraints: Retry: exponential backoff (Retry with exponential backoff)

spec:
# Dense Architecture Specification
# Density Score: 0.570

## Purpose
# Resolution: 52.5%

- Objective: task management
- Users: team-based
- Users: team-based (Team)
- Success: measurable metrics (KPI)
- Success: measurable metrics (dashboard)
- Scope: real-time features

## Data Model
# Resolution: 38.0%

- Relationship: one-to-many
- Constraint: not null (NOT NULL)
- Index strategy specified (index on)

## API
# Resolution: 40.0%

- API style: REST (RESTful)
- API style: REST
- API style: REST (rest)
- API versioning: URL path (v1). Endpoint)
- Realtime: WebSocket (ws)
- Realtime: WebSocket
- Realtime: WebSocket (WS)

## Tech Stack
# Resolution: 72.0%

- Language: Python (Python 3.12)
- Framework: FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Cache: Redis

## Auth
# Resolution: 80.0%

- Auth: JWT tokens
- Authorization: role-based
- Authorization: RBAC
- Session: refresh token rotation
- MFA required

## Deployment
# Resolution: 50.0%

- Infrastructure: Kubernetes
- Cloud: AWS
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions
- Scaling: auto-scaling

## Error Handling
# Resolution: 72.5%

- Error: HTTP status codes specified (400 validation, 401 auth, 403 forbidden, 404 not found, 409 conflict, 429 rate limit, 500 internal. Retry with exponential backoff for upstream calls (max 3 retries, 1s base). Circuit breaker on Redis with 5-failure threshold, 30s recovery. Structured JSON logging with correlation IDs. Log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
- Retry: exponential backoff (Retry with exponential backoff)
- Circuit breaker pattern
- Logging: JSON format (JSON logging)

## Performance
# Resolution: 67.5%

- Latency targets specified (P50)
- Throughput target specified (1000 rps)
- Optimization: connection pooling (Connection pooling)
- Pagination required (pagination)

## Security
# Resolution: 70.0%

- Input validation required
- Encryption: TLS in transit
- CORS policy required
- Rate limiting required (rate limit)
- Rate limiting required

## Testing
# Resolution: 27.5%

- Testing: unit tests (Unit test)
- Test data: fixtures

## All Constraints (Flat)

- Objective: task management
- Users: team-based
- Users: team-based (Team)
- Success: measurable metrics (KPI)
- Success: measurable metrics (dashboard)
- Scope: real-time features
- Relationship: one-to-many
- Constraint: not null (NOT NULL)
- Index strategy specified (index on)
- API style: REST (RESTful)
- API style: REST
- API style: REST (rest)
- API versioning: URL path (v1). Endpoint)
- Realtime: WebSocket (ws)
- Realtime: WebSocket
- Realtime: WebSocket (WS)
- Language: Python (Python 3.12)
- Framework: FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Cache: Redis
- Auth: JWT tokens
- Authorization: role-based
- Authorization: RBAC
- Session: refresh token rotation
- MFA required
- Infrastructure: Kubernetes
- Cloud: AWS
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions
- Scaling: auto-scaling
- Error: HTTP status codes specified (400 validation, 401 auth, 403 forbidden, 404 not found, 409 conflict, 429 rate limit, 500 internal. Retry with exponential backoff for upstream calls (max 3 retries, 1s base). Circuit breaker on Redis with 5-failure threshold, 30s recovery. Structured JSON logging with correlation IDs. Log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
- Retry: exponential backoff (Retry with exponential backoff)
- Circuit breaker pattern
- Logging: JSON format (JSON logging)
- Latency targets specified (P50)
- Throughput target specified (1000 rps)
- Optimization: connection pooling (Connection pooling)
- Pagination required (pagination)
- Input validation required
- Encryption: TLS in transit
- CORS policy required
- Rate limiting required (rate limit)
- Rate limiting required
- Testing: unit tests (Unit test)
- Test data: fixtures

## Implementation Rules

- Every architectural decision MUST trace to a constraint above
- If a dimension has no constraint, ASK — do not invent
- Prefer explicit over implicit in all generated code
- No defaults: every value must come from this spec
